name: ADM TRONICS UNLIMITED, INC.
business: The Company is a technology-based developer and manufacturer of diversified lines of products including electronics for medical devices and other applications, environmentally safe chemical products for industrial, medical and cosmetic uses, and research, development, regulatory and engineering services. It derives revenue from production and sale of these products and services. Two customers accounted for 48% of net revenue in fiscal year 2025.

exposures.sentence: The Company is a technology-based developer and manufacturer of diversified lines of products and derives revenue from the production and sale of electronics for medical devices and other applications;
We develop and manufacture electronic technologies for non-invasive, electrotherapeutic and diagnostic medical devices as well as for veterinary and other applications.

The Company develops, manufactures, and sells chemical products to industrial users. Such products consist primarily of the following: Water-based primers and adhesives; Water-based coatings and resins; Water-based chemical additives; and Anti-static conductive paints, coating and other products.
